item.title: DAMON and BABY demo launches March 19
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch

Post-launch updates to add new characters, stages, and more.

Arc System Works will release a demo for action adventure game DAMON and BABY for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on March 18 at 9:00 p.m. PT / March 19 at 12:00 a.m. ET, the company announced.

While a limited-time demo was available for PC from February 20 to March 3, this new demo will be available for all platforms indefinitely.

Arc System Works also addressed user feedback from the limited-time demo, and is already working on improvements for the following most frequently mentioned points:

  • Save and Retry
    • Resolving the issue where play data rolls back significantly upon game over.
    • Improving the retry mechanics in boss battles.
  • Gameplay and Usability
    • Making dropped item collection more efficient.
    • Improving responsiveness when switching weapons.
    • Adding a feature to sell items directly from the “Portal Chest” at the shop.

The company also plans to address and improve other areas based on user feedback, as well as add new characters, stages, and other content to the game after release.

DAMON and BABY is due out for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on March 25.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/damon-and-baby-demo-launches-march-19
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Rustil: Eternal Labyrinth Castle launches March 13
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Currently in Early Access.

Roguelike action game Rustil: Eternal Labyrinth Castle will leave Early Access and launch for PC via Steam on March 13, developer KIC Games announced.

Rustil: Eternal Labyrinth Castle first launched in Early Access on April 26, 2024.

Some of the new features coming in the version 1.0 release include:

Story Mode

“Within that castle lies lost memories… or a cruel fate.”

Guided by the fairy Kotryn, the protagonist Rustil sets foot into the “Labyrinth Castle,” a place where the souls of the dead rest.

As she encounters the spirits of countless heroes and inherits their will, she pushes deeper into the abyss.

What awaits her at the end is the mystery of the castle—and a harsh truth carved into her very being.

New Floor: “Ruined City”

Futuristic skyscrapers, cracked asphalt—a strange and alien space clearly different from any previous floor.

Countless humanoid robotic weapons, corrupted by the Labyrinth’s magic and running amok, stand in Rustil’s way.

In this place where science and magic intersect, the soul of a certain hero awaits her.

New Hero: “Zera Linfa”

“The self-proclaimed genius girl scientist.”

A Machina with a brilliant mind who once developed the “Wyndham” series of giant humanoid combat weapons in hopes of peace. An indomitable scientist who continues to hack the Labyrinth Castle from the inside, even after death.

Zera is a hero specializing in production-type abilities:

  • Item Enhancement and Transmutation – Enhance items or transform them into completely different ones.
  • Trap Modification – Modify bothersome traps within the stage, turning them into something else entirely.
  • Kotryn Armament – Equip the fairy Kotorin with offensive weaponry or support devices.

Visual Enhancements

  • The Seven Heroes from Other Worlds – Unique visuals have been implemented for all seven heroes, bringing their distinct personalities to life.
  • Enhanced 3D Model for Rustil – Rustil has been reborn with a more charming look! Her face has been remade, and her overall proportions have been adjusted for better balance.

  • Juke Forest – Previously just a pathway, the forest has been completely renewed. There is a chance to find rare items, but there is also a chance that powerful enemies will appear.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Exhilarating roguelike action with monsters and swords at your command

A world where a huge castle suddenly appears.

The protagonist, Rustil, who has no memory of his past, is drawn to the labyrinthine castle.

Key Features

  • Roguelike Action – Choose your favorite ability from the souls of the heroes lying in the labyrinthine castle and acquire it. Enjoy a variety of combat styles with one-handed swords, magic staves, gunblades, and more!
  • Treasure Hunt – A mysterious labyrinthine castle that changes every time you enter! Explore its ever-shifting corridors to collect powerful equipment and recruit monsters to join your team!
  • Choose Your Play Style
    • Safe Mode – A casual exploration mode perfect for relaxed adventuring. Even if your exploration ends in failure, you’ll keep all the items you found.
    • Challenge Mode – A high-stakes mode for those seeking thrill and reward. If you’re defeated and fail to return, you’ll lose all the items you were carrying. However, the risks come with greater rewards—rare equipment drops more frequently, and it’s easier to capture high-stat monsters. (Note: Even if you lose equipment, you may be able to buy it back from the merchant at home.)
  • Monster Training and Battles – All monsters in the game can be captured. You can not only improve their abilities, but also decide their personalities in detail!
  • Speedy and Exhilarating Battles – You can enjoy a variety of actions such as one-handed sword, magic staff, and bayonet! Collect rare items and capture the labyrinth castle!


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/rustil-eternal-labyrinth-castle-launches-march-13
